name: moku
description: Development toolkit for Moku Core — scaffolding, framework planning, plugin building, migration, and specification enforcement for the micro-kernel plugin framework. Features brainstorm command (adaptive discovery, parallel research agents, Present→Challenge→Decide debate loop, context file generation for plan integration), lean execution mode (Taskmaster — ~40-60% context savings), wave pipelining (build N+1 while verifying N), TDD build waves (Red → Green → Refactor), builder intent verification (explain-your-code), multi-pass focused code review, spec regression testing, parallel verify+review, speculative arch validation, lazy hash-based validation, interactive findings triage, steering pre-phase, agent conflict resolution, stuck-loop alt-strategy forcing, decision knowledge graph, wave-based parallel execution (default 5 agents, auto-throttle), 24-agent validation pipeline with structured output contracts, validation coordinator, error diagnostician, post-wave code reviewer, command self-auditing, full-cycle end-to-end audit, hooks validation, task DAG progress tracking, plan mode integration, and cross-session state tracking.
